Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCEES: Atty. ERIC WHITEHEAD, ESQ. of Ray Bourtis Associates, 607-857-0508 for the Plaintiff;
Atty. NANCY B. BRIDGDEN, ESQ. of Patel Burkhalter, Tel No. 678-974-1721 for Defendants Intel Corporation, Reed Group, Ltd. and Claim Appeal Fiduciary Services, Inc.

Matter heard at 2:00 p.m. The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court takes under submission DEFENDANTS INTEL CORPORATION, REED GROUP, LTD. AND CLAIM APPEAL FIDUCIARY SERVICES, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332 (302/JMQ)

Matter heard at 2:00 p.m. The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court takes under submission DEFENDANTS INTEL CORPORATION, REED GROUP, LTD. AND CLAIM APPEAL FIDUCIARY SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332 (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCEES: Atty. ERIC WHITEHEAD, ESQ. of Ray Bourtis Associates, 607-857-0508 for the Plaintiff;
Atty. NANCY B. BRIDGDEN, ESQ. of Patel Burkhalter, Tel No. 678-974-1721 for Defendants Intel Corporation, Reed Group, Ltd. and Claim Appeal Fiduciary Services, Inc.

Matter heard at 2:00 p.m. Matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS INTEL CORPORATION, REED GROUP, LTD. AND CLAIM APPEAL FIDUCIARY SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is off calendar as moot. Judge Joseph M. Quinn granted the verified application of Nancy B. Pridgen for admission pro hac vice to the bar of this court on February 16, 2016. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332 (302/JMQ)
